name: Village Farms International, Inc.
business: Village Farms International sells fresh produce, cannabis products (recreational and medicinal), hemp-derived CBD products, and renewable natural gas. Its customers include Canadian provinces and territories, international medicinal markets, U.S. consumers via e-commerce, Dutch coffee shops, and Vanguard Produce Canada ULC for produce.
sellsTo: International medicinal markets (Australia, Germany, UK, New Zealand, Israel)
U.S. consumers via e-commerce and retail
Dutch coffee shops under Netherlands experiment
Vanguard Produce Canada ULC (sole customer for produce)

exposures.sentence: Our produce business has pioneered Controlled Environment Agriculture (CEA) in North America and helped feed a hungry planet with sustainable greenhouse growing for over three decades.
Pure Sunfarms is one of the largest and most respected cannabis growers in the world and the leading flower brand in Canada.
Balanced Health owns and operates one of the leading brands in the hemp-derived cannabidiol (CBD) and other cannabinoids markets.
The Delta RNG Project converts VFCE’s previous landfill gas-to-electricity business into a state-of-the-art landfill gas to high-demand renewable natural gas (RNG) facility.

Balanced Health owns and operates one of the leading brands in the hemp-derived cannabidiol (CBD) and other cannabinoids markets, produces high quality health and wellness products and distributes primarily through its top-ranked e-commerce platform, CBDistillery.
Rose sells its own cannabis products under five brands: nationally distributed Homage, Tam Tams, Promenade, DLYS and Pure Laine.

catalysts.sentence: We expect that the incremental square footage will commence production in the summer of 2026
with full ramp up estimated to be achieved in the calendar year 2027
Our second facility in Groningen will be substantially completed in late March 2026 with operations planned to commence in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: First commercial sales to Dutch coffee shops
catalysts.sentence: Leli Holland’s production facility in Drachten was completed in October 2024, with the first commercial sales to designated Dutch coffee shops in February 2025.
